title: CVE-2010-3505 — CVSS 3.5 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2010-3505

CVSS Score: 3.5 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2011-01-19T16:00:02.327
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in the Agile Core component in Oracle Supply Chain Products Suite 9.3.0.2 and 9.3.1 allows remote authenticated users to affect confidentiality via unknown vectors related to Folders, Files & Attachments, a different vulnerability than CVE-2010-4429.

References: http://secunia.com/advisories/42923, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpujan2011-194091.html, http://www.securityfocus.com/bid/45872
